summary: Excellent sounding tape of a strong show featuring a soaring Estimated Prophet solo and fresh Go to Heaven material
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear sound and the performance shines, especially Jerry Garcia’s sunrise‑like solo on “Estimated Prophet” and the enthusiastic delivery of several new “Go to Heaven” cuts. Reviewers note the tape sounds great throughout, making it an enjoyable listen despite the lack of detailed source information.

ai_rating.rationale: Three out of four reviews are highly positive about both performance and sound quality; one review gives a zero star rating but uses only complimentary language, leading to an overall strong but slightly uncertain rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers describe the tape as “amazing”, “great sounding” and note good sound quality; no specific mention of soundboard vs audience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set pacing, but the inclusion of fresh “Go to Heaven” material and a memorable Estimated Prophet jam are highlighted.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His solo on Estimated Prophet is described as a sunrise‑like experience and a highlight of the show.
